title: Optional local model compaction canary gates
user_task: Validate that optional local model compaction remains disabled by default, requires explicit config and approval, rejects raw transcript/current safe_text inputs, and only emits advisory summary-leaf-shaped output from approved prepared-card and summary-leaf refs.
expected_public_safe_evidence: source refs and source range refs
proof_boundary: Dry-run canary fixture and focused core test only. It may prove fail-closed opt-in boundaries and advisory summary-leaf-shaped output from approved prepared inputs; it does not run local model compaction, call a model, read raw transcripts, feed current safe_text, mutate Codex source stores, run live Codex control, mutate a GUI, publish npm, create a GitHub Release, prove true Codex compaction-summary capture, or make model compaction default or required for 1.2.
next_action: Keep model compaction as a separate opt-in future capability until a real implementation has its own approval, sanitizer, model-call, cost, and release-claim gates.
